# SPA microcopy fragment

This file is a fixture for the Epic-4 exit-criterion spec
(`tests/exit-criteria/epic-04-lint-coverage.spec.mjs`). It mimics SPA-side
microcopy in body form so the corpus lints can be exercised against an
SPA-shaped surface without inventing a fake corpus page.

The screener uses 16 visual items. It runs in your browser. It stores
nothing on a server. The result is one number with a range around it.
You can stop at any time. You may read the methodology if you want to
know more.

This is not a clinical test. It is not a credential. It is a screen of
one narrow ability — fluid reasoning under no time pressure.
